Badge acquired

$15M ARR run-rate in 10 weeks is the kind of number that makes the entire AI agent market go quiet.

Viktor just raised a $75M Series A led by Accel.

Not for another chatbot.
Not for another tab.
Not for another “copilot” that still needs babysitting.

It lives inside Slack +

Omni from @GoogleDeepMind just dropped 👀

It's a big step forward in video generation when it comes to character consistency, world knowledge, and editing.

I've been testing it for the last few days - and I'm excited to walk through some of the key features + my clips 👇 https://t.co/axDFdGAB9x

@GoogleDeepMind 1) Avatars

Record a clip of yourself, and your face + voice will be saved as a character that you can add to any video.

This makes it so easy to put yourself in any clip, while changing your style or outfit as needed to adapt to the scene.

These clips are all my avatar 🤯 https://t.co/gV2gUPJPZO

@GoogleDeepMind 4) Conversational generation

You've never been able to "talk" to a video model like you chat with an LLM.

That changes with Omni. You can ask it to edit or iterate on a video it generated, or continue a narrative.

This video is two clips - I just asked for "more street https://t.co/bRfc4gjZKA

@GoogleDeepMind 5) Multi-image prompting

Omni can take up to five images and one video as a prompt.

I've been putting this to the limit - taking screenshots of Zillow listings and dumping them into the model.

I've been pretty impressed with the results! (and want >10 seconds 😉) https://t.co/isGBVptxbt

Cool new launch for Project Genie ✨

World generation is now grounded with Google Maps.

Pick a real-world location, restyle it, and draft a character to explore the scene.

I turned @a16z SF into a desert and wandered around as a camel. https://t.co/qtbqMBikaj
